/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_move.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_lifecycle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_introspection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_edge.cpp.o -o tests
